data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): None ticket_type safety — when a ticket in the BFS path has ticket_type=None (error-state ticket from _make_error_dict), calling .lower() raises AttributeError. Implementation must guard: ticket_type = state.get('ticket_type') or '' and use ticket_type.lower() only when non-empty. Add criterion: - [ ] BFS does not crash when ticket has ticket_type=None. Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py::test_check_cycle_at_level_skips_none_type -x
